title: Statistics
subtitle: {group} activity, attendance, applications, and loadout trends.

participation.title: Participation Trend
participation.subtitle: People per day on days where runs happened during the past month.
participation.empty_description: Runs with rostered participants will appear here once they happen.

applications.distribution_subtitle: Current application outcomes across the group's runs.
applications.volume_subtitle: Monthly application volume for the past 12 months.
applications.empty_description: Application activity will appear here once players apply to runs.

classes.title: Class Distribution
classes.subtitle: Most played combat classes from rostered assignments.
classes.trend_subtitle: Monthly trend for the top played classes.
classes.empty_description: Class usage appears when assignments include class slot selections.

phantom_jobs.title: Phantom Job Distribution
phantom_jobs.subtitle: Most played phantom jobs from rostered assignments.
phantom_jobs.trend_subtitle: Monthly trend for the top played phantom jobs.
phantom_jobs.empty_description: Phantom job usage appears when assignments include phantom job slot selections.
